action.description:
Introduced by Representatives Mayadev, Brill, Joers, Billings, Allen, Armstrong, Behnke, Brown, Clancy, DeSmidt, Emerson, Fitzgerald, Knodl, Miresse, O'Connor, Ortiz-Velez, Prado, Rivera-Wagner, Roe, Sinicki, Snodgrass, Taylor, Udell, Stubbs and Neubauer; 
cosponsored by Senators Jacque, Habush Sinykin, Roys, Wall, Hesselbein and Larson
